body.title: CLOSED: Create devices/akien/ shim — Akien as addressable rack entity
body.result: devices/akien/ shim + ARCHITECTURE.md + palace.shared.akien.goals upserted — commit 836d882 (validated)
body.description:
Akien's web and Discord traffic currently has no rack-native structure. Creating devices/akien/ gives his messages a comms:// address (comms://akien/) that the bus can route like any other device. inbox/outbox/ideas dirs already exist at ~/.agent_datacenter/akien/; this adds the code definition.

Also: upsert the full goals_tree.20260507.md content into palace.shared.akien.goals (currently the node is a 788-char summary with a pointer back to the flat file — paper echo).

**Affected files:** devices/akien/__init__.py (new), devices/akien/shim.py (new), devices/akien/docs/ARCHITECTURE.md (new)
**Design rules:** no-sqlite, no-TheIgors-imports; data home is ~/.agent_datacenter/akien/ (already exists)
**Scope boundary:** device definition + goals palace upsert only. No comms:// routing wiring yet (that's T-web-akien-comms). No running process — Akien is not a daemon.
**Test plan:** devices/akien/ importable; shim.who_am_i() returns correct shape; palace.shared.akien.goals content length > 2000 chars after upsert.
